response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of full-stack experience, including recent production work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS, plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, which directly matches a required and rare skill. His testing pedigree is exceptional (TDD practice, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), and he holds a CS degree. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Python experience, and a notable share of his career invested in the niche D language and Ember.js rather than the target stack, but these are trainable given his demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS production work
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator experience, matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework for the role
Testing framework expertise centers on Jest/Selenium-era tooling rather than Vitest or Playwright
No Kotlin or Python listed, and considerable career time in niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
